title: GetHistoricalBalancesResponse
description: Historical end-of-day balance snapshots for the authenticated user.

displayCurrency.description: ISO 4217 currency code used for display values.

fromDate.description: Start of the returned date range (inclusive, ISO 8601).

toDate.description: End of the returned date range (inclusive, ISO 8601).

snapshots.description: End-of-day balance snapshots, one entry per day in the requested range.
